items.text: VSA and TCS functions are canceled when VSA maintenance mode is activated.
VSA and TCS functions are canceled when VSA maintenance mode is activated.

During the maintenance mode, the VSA OFF warning light flashes and the VSA warning light illuminates. When the ignition is turned to the OFF (LOCK) mode or the VSA OFF switch is pressed again, the maintenance mode is canceled and each warning light turns off.

During the maintenance mode, the VSA OFF warning light flashes and the VSA warning light illuminates. When the ignition is turned to the OFF (LOCK) mode or the VSA OFF switch is pressed again, the maintenance mode is canceled and each warning light turns off.

If the condition is removed during the operation, or if more than 30 seconds have elapsed since the start of the operation, the ignition should be turned to OFF (LOCK) mode, and the operation should be performed again after an interval of at least 10 seconds.

If the condition is removed during the operation, or if more than 30 seconds have elapsed since the start of the operation, the ignition should be turned to OFF (LOCK) mode, and the operation should be performed again after an interval of at least 10 seconds.
If the VSA detects a failure, the maintenance mode is canceled.
If the VSA detects a failure, the maintenance mode is canceled.

blocks.text: Start the engine and perform the following operations within 30 seconds. With the parking brake released and the brake pedal depressed, press the VSA OFF switch, and when the VSA OFF warning light comes on, press the VSA OFF switch again to confirm that the VSA OFF warning light goes out. Apply the parking brake, press the VSA OFF switch with the brake pedal released, and when the VSA OFF warning light comes on, press the VSA OFF switch again to confirm that the VSA OFF warning light goes out. With the parking brake applied, press the VSA OFF switch with the brake pedal depressed, and when the VSA OFF warning light comes on, press the VSA OFF switch again and confirm that the VSA OFF warning light flashes and the VSA warning light comes on.
